visual_features.overall_style: Corporate, slightly dated but clean, with a strong brand color (orange) and a boxed layout framed by light grey side gutters. The style is functional and straightforward with flat UI elements, minimal decoration, and a large photographic hero emphasising industrial context.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven by color contrast, size, and placement. The top left brand logo is the first focal point, followed by the orange-highlighted HOME tab. Below that, the large hero image dominates the page. Within the hero, the white 'ABOUT US' heading and description text overlay stand out against the colorful photo, and the solid orange 'READ MORE' button becomes the primary CTA due to high contrast and solid fill. Secondary items include the top-right utility elements ('FIND A STOCKIST', search box, secondary logo) and the slider pagination at the bottom-right of the hero.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Moderate whitespace overall: the header uses ample vertical padding around logos and navigation, and the main content column is framed by wide light-grey side margins. Within the hero overlay, text blocks are spaced with comfortable line height and padding from edges. The design avoids crowding but is not extremely spacious; it uses whitespace mainly around primary structures rather than within dense component groupings.
unique_elements: Large industrial photographic hero slider with text overlays and numbered pagination
Bold orange navigation tab for active state spanning full height of the menu bar
Boxed content layout centered on page with grey side gutters simulating a frame
Secondary parent-brand lockup ('an ADBRI company') in a contrasting dark blue in the upper-right
Slider pagination using numbered boxes with an orange-highlighted current slide

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Visually consistent with a 12-column centered grid in a fixed-width container (approx. 1100–1200px) with wide side gutters on larger screens.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Boxed, centered layout with a full-width (within container) hero slider under a horizontal top navigation and utility bar.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top utility/header bar with logo and tools, horizontal primary navigation bar immediately underneath, followed by a dominant hero slider section. Main content sections are implied to continue below in a linear vertical stack.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Strong left alignment for primary navigation, logo, hero text, and content. Right alignment used for secondary utilities (search, 'FIND A STOCKIST', parent brand). Text within components is generally left-aligned; navigation items are centered within their tabs.
responsive_hints: Boxed central column suggests content will remain centered with flexible side gutters on wider screens.
Horizontal navigation with large hit areas could collapse to a stacked or hamburger menu on smaller devices.
Hero image appears to be a background or responsive image that can crop while maintaining focal areas.
Slider pagination uses large enough touch targets to be adaptable to tablet interfaces.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: (1) a header area with logo on the left and utility actions on the right, (2) a single-row horizontal navigation menu spanning the width of the content container, (3) a large full-width hero slider occupying the primary viewport height with an image background, left-aligned text overlay (headline, brief paragraph), and a prominent CTA button, and (4) hero slider pagination controls at the bottom-right of the image. Content blocks follow a simple stacked arrangement, all constrained within the central boxed layout.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: The header and navigation together occupy roughly the top 15–20% of the viewport, with the hero slider taking up the majority of the remaining initial screen height. The hero image spans the full width of the content container with minimal vertical padding above and below, maximizing visual impact. Side gutters (light grey areas) likely account for ~10–15% of the total screen width on large displays, giving a framed appearance. Within the hero, the text overlay occupies the left ~40% of the image width, while the right ~60% is primarily visual imagery.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Moderate density. The header and nav are compact, with tightly grouped navigation items. The hero section, however, is visually spacious, thanks to a large image and limited text. There is enough whitespace around text elements and buttons for readability, but the design does not feel overly minimal; it balances content and whitespace with a mild corporate density.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Predominantly F-pattern: the eye starts at the top left (Cockburn Cement logo), scans horizontally across the navigation and utility area to the right. It then drops down along the left side to the active HOME tab and into the hero heading 'ABOUT US', scrolling down through the paragraph text and finally to the orange 'READ MORE' button. Secondary attention is drawn to the right side of the hero by the human figure in the photo and then to the bottom-right slider pagination.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Rectangular buttons with sharp or minimally rounded corners (approx. 2–3px radius, visually close to square). The primary CTA uses a solid orange fill (#F58220) with white uppercase text. Padding appears generous horizontally (around 16–24px) and moderate vertically (8–12px). No visible drop shadow; flat design with strong color contrast. Secondary icon (a right-pointing chevron) is placed on the right side inside the button, aligned with the label text.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Implemented as either

ui_patterns.visual_description: The hero slider acts as a large 'card-like' panel: full-bleed image background overlaid with text and CTA. Edges are sharp; no visible border or shadow, separation is created by the contrast against the light grey page background. Pagination boxes at the bottom-right are small rectangular tiles with light borders; the active tile has an orange fill with white text, inactive tiles have white fill with grey text and subtle border.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Each slide likely represented as a container div (e.g., .slide) with an img or background image, plus an absolutely-positioned overlay div containing heading, paragraph, and button. Pagination rendered as an ordered or unordered list (<ul><li>) of links or buttons, each representing a slide index.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Search form in the header: a single-line input with a light border (approx. #CCCCCC) and white background. Sharp corners, rectangular shape with moderate width. A small orange search icon is embedded or placed at the right inside a square button area. The overall style is flat and minimal, with placeholder or label text likely in grey.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Simple inline form with <form><input type='search' /></form>. The input may be wrapped in a container with a positioned button or icon span on the right. Labels are likely visually hidden for accessibility, relying on placeholder text and the search icon for affordance.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Primary navigation is a horizontal bar below the logo. Each item is a rectangular tab with equal height, separated by subtle vertical dividers or box boundaries. The active item (HOME) is filled with solid orange (#F58220) and white uppercase text. Inactive items have white backgrounds, medium-grey text (#666666–#777777), and may show subtle bottom or side borders. Hover states are likely to change background or text color, possibly adopting a light grey background or orange underline.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Standard <nav> element containing an unordered list <ul> with list items <li> for each navigation link, each containing an <a> tag. Active states managed via a class on either the <li> or <a> (e.g., .active). Utility nav (Find a Stockist, search) is probably a separate flex container aligned to the right.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Slider pagination is a linear list of small boxes with numbers. Items are low-density with modest padding and a clear separation through borders and spacing. Active item uses orange background; adjacent items use white with light grey text. Arrows (left/right) are in similar boxes but with chevron icons instead of numbers.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Likely implemented as an ordered or unordered list (<ol>/<ul>) arranged horizontally via flexbox or inline-block. Each list item contains either text (the page number) or an icon. Classes handle active states (e.g., .is-active).

heading.visual_style: Uppercase, bold sans-serif with relatively uniform stroke width and a utilitarian corporate feel—likely a neutral grotesque with good legibility.

body.visual_style: Clean, neutral sans-serif for paragraphs and navigation; simple forms and readable at smaller sizes, consistent with an Arial/Helvetica-style grotesque.

spacing_system.component_padding: Core interactive elements (buttons, tabs) use approximately 8px vertical and 16–24px horizontal padding. Hero text overlay has around 24–32px padding from image edges.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections (header, nav, hero, subsequent content) is roughly 32–48px, maintaining a clear separation without appearing overly airy.

interaction_hints: Navigation tabs likely change background color or underline on hover, with the active tab remaining solid orange.
Buttons likely darken slightly or gain a subtle border on hover, while maintaining flat design without strong shadows.
Hero slider probably auto-rotates between slides with a fade or horizontal slide transition, synchronized with pagination state change.
Slider pagination numbers and arrows likely highlight (orange border or background) on hover and indicate active state clearly.
Search input may show a darker border or subtle glow when focused to indicate active text entry.
Micro-interactions should remain subtle and fast (150–250ms) to match the straightforward corporate aesthetic.
